papers_mined.title: Cynghanedd (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Cynghanedd Groes (Cross Harmony): precise mirroring of consonants across two halves of a line + internal rhyme between accented syllables.

papers_mined.title: Cynghanedd (Britannica)
papers_mined.note: Welsh bardic poetry strict meter; obligatory in 24 forms; alliterative+internal-rhyme phonology.

papers_mined.title: Cynghanedd (Grokipedia)
papers_mined.note: 4 types: Groes (cross), Draws (trailing), Sain (sound), Lusg (echo). Caerwys 1523 codification.
